verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It doesn't matter where I run, You're there for me It doesn't matter what I've done Your love's for me You wipe away the tears, You lift me when i fall My life is safe by the mercy of Your grace

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It doesn't matter where I go, You walk with me It doesn't matter when I fall, You cover me You wipe away the tears, You lift me when i fall My life is safe by the mercy of Your grace

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are my Father, provider You're my deliverer Your mercies embrace me, surround me Through Your everlasting love

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Father I worship You Father I worship You
